title: The Widowed Socks
content:
Okay, I admit it. I have a problem.

Almost everytime I do laundry, I always miss a sock - not a pair of socks, just one. Right now, I have a drawerful of "widowed socks". Unfortunately, they're all in different colors so I cannot just re-pair them with the other widowed socks. And Bangkok is not a city where you need to wear a pair of socks when you go to bed (to keep you warm).

Maybe I should decorate my room with the "widowed socks".

This is embarassing. --"
